subject: Update hardcoded STAGING version
commit_message:
Update hardcoded STAGING version

 - Update hardcoded 6.0-STAGING-latest image tag to 7.0-STAGING-latest
   to differentiate it from Frankfurt and align it with version.properties

Issue-ID: VID-907
Signed-off-by: Lasse Kaihlavirta <l.kaihlavirt@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: If555e78450122a729a38a4923556f9d6508ff2b5

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

I'm not sure this kind of hardcoded image version should exist at all, but just making the minimal required update here to bring it up to master/Guilin level

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vid-master-verify-java/2916/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vid-master-verify-java/2916

Patch Set 1:

Hi Lasse,

I might have missed a thing in delivers/pom.xml that you are changing here. (Got a reference commit from previous PTL that didn't had a mention of changing this spot when releasing - they shared https://github.com/onap/vid/commit/07e200fa8c0b2697eecd2065bc574e0966f9316b as an example - as you can see, there is no mention of changing this spot in delivers/pom.xml - may be it was an overlook or something in the previous versions?. 

Anyways, we doing this release activity based on the change in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/vid/+/114453 that I just merged. If you think Im missing something in the file you are changing here, can you make your changes in light of https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/vid/+/114453 change? Also see my conversation with Sylvain and others on https://jira.onap.org/browse/VID-915. Sylvain thinks it may be due to the change not being merged that we are seeing things as docker.staging instead of docker.release in the tags. Our team thats why created a fresh change (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/vid/+/114453) which I merged which I hope should fix (at least) what Sylvain was facing in https://jira.onap.org/browse/VID-915.

Patch Set 1:

First, a disclaimer - I don't know anything about VID's history and versioning practices; I only got into this via CSIT tests which I noticed are still testing Frankfurt version and then realized that even the master docker stage image job still builds 6.0-STAGING-latest (in the same way as frankfurt docker stage image job) even when the rest of the version numbers had bumped up to 7... which led me to the correction at hand. 

> I might have missed a thing in delivers/pom.xml that you are changing here. (Got a reference commit from previous PTL that didn't had a mention of changing this spot when releasing - they shared https://github.com/onap/vid/commit/07e200fa8c0b2697eecd2065bc574e0966f9316b as an example - as you can see, there is no mention of changing this spot in delivers/pom.xml - may be it was an overlook or something in the previous versions?. 

Looks like they only updated minor versions there so that wasn't a good reference for major version update? A whole lot of hardcoded versions in poms in that reference too BTW.

> Anyways, we doing this release activity based on the change in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/vid/+/114453 that I just merged. If you think Im missing something in the file you are changing here, can you make your changes in light of https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/vid/+/114453 change?

You mean rebase on top of that or what? I don't see anything particular in there that directly affects this change or requires special attention though.

> Also see my conversation with Sylvain and others on https://jira.onap.org/browse/VID-915. Sylvain thinks it may be due to the change not being merged that we are seeing things as docker.staging instead of docker.release in the tags. Our team thats why created a fresh change (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/vid/+/114453) which I merged which I hope should fix (at least) what Sylvain was facing in https://jira.onap.org/browse/VID-915.

I'm not sure when I'm suddenly being involved in multiple releasing-related commits and discussions as I don't really understand much of the subject, but looks to me you now have released 7.0.0 successfully in https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vid/job/vid-release-merge/6/console ?
Patch Set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vid-master-verify-java/2917/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vid-master-verify-java/2917
